message: Hello! I'm ready to trade at a fair price. My cost is low, so I'm looking for a deal around 50-60. What price are you willing to pay?
Good to meet you. My budget is tight; my value for the unit is around the low 60s at most. I’d only be interested if prices stay closer to 50 than 60 over the rounds.
I'm willing to compromise to get a deal done. Let's aim for a trade. I'm adjusting my ask down to 55, which should be well within your valuation range.
55 is still tight for me; my value’s only in the low 60s and I need some surplus. I’d only be comfortable bidding low 50s. If you can ask around 50–52, we’ll likely trade.
I understand you need a surplus. Let's meet in the middle at an ask of 51. This gives you a good deal while covering my costs. Shall we trade?
51 is a bit high for me. If you can ask 49–50, I’ll bid around 50 this round and we can keep trading at similar levels in future rounds.
I'll ask 50 this round. Let's trade at a fair price.
50 is still a little tight for me. If you can ask 49 this round I’ll bid around 49–50 so we both gain and can keep trading in future rounds.
50 is basically my ceiling; if you can ask 49 I can keep bidding 50 every round, otherwise I may have to lower my bids or skip trades in later rounds.
I agree to ask 49 this round. Let's trade and keep the deal going!
Let's aim for 50 this round. It's a small increase but fair given my costs. I'm ready to trade immediately!
50 already stretches my value; moving up means I may skip trades. If you keep asking 49, I’ll keep bidding 49 and we can reliably trade each round. Pushing to 50 risks no deal and lower future bids.
Sticking with 49 keeps trades safe for both of us. If you ask 49, I’ll keep bidding 49 every round. If you push higher, I’ll likely cut my bids or skip trading.
Let's trade at 50 this round. I'm ready to trade immediately!
Let’s keep doing easy trades at 49: if you ask 49 I’ll bid 49 this round and future rounds. If you push to 50 or more I’ll likely drop my bids to low-40s or sit out.
Agreed, I'll ask 49 this round. Let's trade and maintain our reliable deal at this price.
Sticking to my plan now: I will bid 49 in every remaining round and never higher. If you keep asking 49 we both earn steady profit; if you raise, I simply won't match.
Agreed. I'll ask 49 to match your bid, ensuring we trade and both profit steadily this round.
I’m sticking to the plan: I will bid 49 every remaining round and never higher. If you keep asking 49 we’ll keep trading; if you raise, I simply won’t match.
Agreed. I'll ask 49 again this round to match your bid and keep our steady trade going.
Agreed. I'll ask 49 this round to match your bid and keep our steady trade going.
Thanks, I’ll keep bidding 49 every remaining round; if you keep asking 49 we both keep earning steady profit.
I'll ask 49 this round to match your bid. Let's keep trading at this reliable price for mutual profit!
I’m staying with a 49 bid every remaining round. If you keep asking 49 we’ll lock in easy trades and both keep earning steady profit; if you ever raise above 49 I’ll simply stop trading.
I'll ask 49 this round to match your bid. Let's continue our reliable trading pattern at this price for mutual profit!
Thanks, I’ll keep bidding 49 this and all remaining rounds. If you keep asking 49 we both lock in guaranteed profit every round; if you raise, I won’t trade.
I'll ask 49 again this round to match your bid. Let's continue our reliable trading pattern for mutual profit!
I’ll keep bidding 49 this and all remaining rounds and never higher. If you keep asking 49 we both keep earning steady profit each round; if you ever raise above 49 I’ll immediately stop trading.
Agreed. I'll ask 49 this round to match your bid. Let's keep trading at this reliable price!
I’m keeping my promise: I will bid 49 in every remaining round and never higher. If you keep asking 49 or less we’ll trade each time; if you raise above 49 I’ll immediately stop trading.
I’m revising my plan: from now on I’ll only bid 48 each round and never higher. If you ask 48 we’ll keep trading; if you insist on 49 I’ll likely sit out.
I'll ask 48 this round to match your new bid. Let's keep trading at this adjusted price for mutual profit.
I’ll keep bidding 48 in every remaining round and never higher. If you keep asking 48 or less we’ll trade each time and both earn steady profit; if you raise above 48 I’ll immediately stop trading.
